title: Modded Monkey SMP
description: 26.1.2 Modded Java Friendly Survival! A Place for You & Your Friends.
body:
# Welcome to the MonkeyStudio Server! ## ABOUT THE SERVER - The **official MonkeyStudio Server**, using all the **MonkeyStudio projects**. - **Always up to date** on the latest version of Minecraft. - Great for **meeting new players** or **playing with friends**. - **Community Driven**, want something you don't see? **Suggest it** on the Discord Server, and the mod will be added to the modpack based on a **popularity vote**. ## HOW TO JOIN **Manual Mod Installation:** You must install **Backpacked** and **Framework** into the **modpack's mod folder** before joining for the first time! - [Backpacked Direct Download Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked/download/7943165) - [Framework Direct Download Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework/download/7964503) **Server Address** - **Main:** `monkeystudio.kinetichosting.gg` - **Alternative:** `usw-ca-p15-a2-s.kineticpanel.net:25587` - **Direct IP:** `172.240.67.11:25587` **Join the Community!**: - Join the Discord: **https://discord.gg/Uttj34u4PJ** - Make friends and build a team to work with! ## FEATURES - Want something you don't see? Suggest it on the Discord Server, and the mod will be added to the modpack based on a popularity vote. - Mostly **vanilla** with small improvements: - Performance and optimization - Cosmetic tweaks - Teams and land claiming - Player revive system - Damage indicator - Sitting on stairs, carpets, etc. - Built-in shops for safe trading

## WORLD AND PLAYER SAFETY Playing on a public server shouldn't mean that one day the server will go down or someone will grief you, and there's nothing you can do about it. So, - **World Backups** are made daily - There are **Rollback tools** to undo griefing - If the server ever shuts down or resets, a **world download will be available** --- If you have any questions or need help joining, ask on Discord. **Hope to see you online!**
